description: A cryptocurrency trading dashboard with real-time charts, multiple strategies, and signal notifications
NEXUS-Terminal is a high-performance, real-time crypto trading dashboard designed for institutional-grade arbitrage and analytics.
Real-time crypto trading dashboard with live PnL tracking and position management.
A high-performance real-time crypto trading dashboard with WebGL visualizations and sub-millisecond updates.
Real-time crypto trading dashboard: live market data, order execution, historical analytics, alerts, and system metrics (Next.js + Express + PostgreSQL + ClickHouse + Redis + WebSocket + Docker).

GMGN Clone: Next.js crypto trading dashboard featuring token tables with real-time price data, market metrics (liquidity, market cap, holders), degen audit tools, wallet integration, filtering/sorting, and buy/sell functionality for Solana tokens.
crypto trading dashboard with real-time charts
